// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

[Flags]
public enum MyEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Description = 8,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

public static partial class Enums
{
    public static partial class MyEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 5;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "Value1",
                "Value2",
                "Value3",
                "Value4",
                "Value5"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1,
                Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2,
                Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3,
                Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4,
                Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1,
                2,
                3,
                4
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (format.HasFlag(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Name))
            {
                if (value.Equals("Value1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value2", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value3", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value4", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value5", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if (format.HasFlag(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Value))
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("2", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("4", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if (format.HasFlag(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Description))
            {

                if (value.Equals("mydescription2\0<-nullbyte", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription3\t<-tab", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription4\"<-qoute", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription5", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (format.HasFlag(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Name))
            {
                if (value.Equals("Value1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value2", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value3", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value4", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Value5", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if (format.HasFlag(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Value))
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;

                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("4", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            {

                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription3\t<-tab", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription4\"<-qoute", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("mydescription5", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        public static (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum, string)[] GetDescriptions() => _descriptions ??= new (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum, string)[] {
                (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2, "mydescription2\0<-nullbyte"),
                (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3, "mydescription3\t<-tab"),
                (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4, "mydescription4\"<-qoute"),
                (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5, "mydescription5")
            };

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;
        private static (Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum, string)[]? _descriptions;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

public static partial class MyEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum value) => value switch
    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1 => "Value1",
        Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2 => "Value2",
        Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3 => "Value3",
        Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4 => "Value4",
        Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5 => "Value5",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value1:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3:
                underlyingValue = 2;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4:
                underlyingValue = 3;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5:
                underlyingValue = 4;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }

    public static bool TryGetDescription(this Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum value,
#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
[NotNullWhen(true)]
#endif
out string? description)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value2:
                description = "mydescription2\0<-nullbyte";
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value3:
                description = "mydescription3\t<-tab";
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value4:
                description = "mydescription4\"<-qoute";
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum.Value5:
                description = "mydescription5";
                return true;
        }
        description = null;
        return false;
    }

    public static string GetDescription(this Some.Namespace.Here.MyEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetDescription(value, out string? description))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return description!;
    }
}
